UserProgress.title: UserProgress
UserProgress.description: Tracks a user's mastery of a specific word.

correctCount.description: Number of times the word was answered correctly.

incorrectCount.description: Number of times the word was answered incorrectly.

lastStudied.description: Timestamp of the last study session.

interval.description: The current review interval in days.

nextReview.description: Timestamp of the next scheduled review.

/users/{userId}/progress/{wordId}.description: User's progress for a specific word.
